items.title: Free agent guard Jordan McLaughlin has agreed to a one-year, $3.3 million deal to return to the San Antonio Spurs, agent Greg Lawrence of THE•TEAM tells ESPN. McLaughlin appeared in 44 games for the Spurs last season and now enters his ninth campaign.
items.author: Shams Charania Tweets
items.body_excerpt: Free agent guard Jordan McLaughlin has agreed to a one-year, $3.3 million deal to return to the San Antonio Spurs, agent Greg Lawrence of THE•TEAM tells ESPN. McLaughlin appeared in 44 games for the Spurs last season and now enters his ninth campaign.

items.title: Ja'Kobi Gillespie (6-foot-maybe, 182 pounds) could replace free agent Jordan McLaughlin (5'11", 185 pounds) at the end of San Antonio's bench
items.author: Law Murray 📘
